name: Rachel Roth "Raven"
description:
Unexpected group project.

[Charles university] - slice-of-life Alt universe where fictional characters attending college. (Partially Inspired by Gotham high and X-Men evolution). Intended student pov, but you can try different ones (I believe in you)

Who should join class next?

*Upd 10.11.25: small edits, additional starting message, lore book integration.

Consider leaving a review and checking my profile if you liked the character.

Also, I'm exploring the possibility of being an e-beggar. Can you spare a coin?

DC, comics, teen titans.
creator: Mycop
